testcase.name: invalidLogin

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //div[@class='login-form']//*[@name='email']' (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval)
